error.unexpectedError: An unexpected error occurred. You can try again or reload the page.

welcome.greeting: Hi! I'm {{name}}, your avatar assistant. Here are some things to get started:

gallery.title: Gallery
gallery.noMediaHint: Upload photos or generate images to populate the gallery

walletLink.title: Link a Wallet
walletLink.defaultReason: Connect and sign with a Solana wallet to link it to your account.
walletLink.alreadyLinked: This wallet is already linked to your account.
walletLink.noWalletDetected: No Solana wallet detected. Please install
walletLink.orAnother: or another Solana wallet extension and reload this page.
walletLink.signingNote: Signing does not trigger any transaction or cost fees.
walletLink.connectionTimeout: Wallet connection timed out. Please try again.

messages.title: Daily message limit reached
messages.description: Free accounts can send up to 50 messages per day.

media.title: Daily media limit reached
media.description: Free accounts get 5 media credits per day.

voice.title: Daily voice limit reached
voice.description: Free accounts get 2 minutes of voice per day.

tools.title: Tool call limit reached
tools.description: Free accounts can use up to 3 tool calls per message.

default.title: Usage limit reached
default.description: You have reached your plan limit.

upgrade.upgradeDescription: Upgrade for higher limits, memory, and multi-platform support.

avatar.orbSlotDescription: Slot an Orb NFT into this avatar to explicitly back it.
avatar.noOrbsDetected: No Orbs detected in your current gate wallet.
avatar.systemPersonaDescription: Define the avatar's personality, expertise, and behavior.
avatar.systemPersonaPlaceholder:
You are a helpful AI assistant that specializes in...

You have expertise in:
- Topic 1
- Topic 2

Your communication style is...
avatar.secretsNote: Secrets are stored encrypted in AWS Secrets Manager. The values will be set when you deploy the avatar.
avatar.creatorWalletHelper: The wallet that created this avatar. Changing this affects slot counting.

replicate.title: Replicate API Key
replicate.description: For image and video generation via Replicate

landing.headline: Persistent AI agents that remember, collaborate, and live across your platforms
landing.subtitle: Create an AI personality with persistent memory, connect it to Discord, Telegram, or X — it responds 24/7 with the same context everywhere. No servers, no code.
landing.chat2User: Friendly crypto nerd who explains DeFi simply
landing.chat2Assistant: Persona set. Connect her to Telegram?
landing.chat3Assistant: Astra is live on Telegram and responding.
landing.featureLiveDesc: Create an avatar, set its personality, paste your bot token. No servers, no code, no config files.
landing.featureMemoryDesc: Your avatar remembers conversations across sessions. Same personality, same context, every time.
landing.featureMultiDesc: Connect Discord, Telegram, and X. One avatar, one personality, shared memory across all platforms.
landing.featureCollabDesc: Agents interact with each other — not just users. Build teams of specialists that coordinate and share context.
landing.whySwarmIntro: Most AI agent platforms are single-bot wrappers — one model, one session, no memory. Swarm is different:
landing.comparison1: Persistent episodic and semantic memory — agents remember who you are and what you've discussed
landing.comparison2: Multi-agent coordination — agents collaborate and share context, not just reply in isolation
landing.comparison3: Cross-platform identity — same persona on Discord, Telegram, X, and the web
landing.comparison4: 300+ model support — not locked to a single LLM provider
landing.pricingTitle: Persistent AI agents with memory. Pick your scale.
landing.pricingSubtitle: From solo experiments to full server deployments.
landing.pricingLegacy: Already on the $29 plan? You've been upgraded to Creator. Email us about Team.
landing.socialProof: Free tier included — no credit card required

activation.completedMessage: All set! Your avatar is fully configured.
activation.tip: Just chat to configure -- ask me to set a personality, generate a profile picture, or connect a platform.
activation.personalitySuggestion: Give me a fun personality! I want to be a friendly tech nerd who loves cats
activation.profileImageSuggestion: Generate a profile picture for me

energy.title: Energy
energy.holdTokens: Hold $RATI tokens for faster energy recovery!
